notes: RapidPro documents a REST API v2 but publishes no OpenAPI machine spec (docs are HTML + a self-hosted API explorer). Authored OpenAPI 3.0 by hand. Endpoint paths (/api/v2/contacts.json, /api/v2/flow_starts.json, /api/v2/broadcasts.json) and the upsert-by-URN query-param behaviour confirmed from the adaptor dist source. Host is instance-specific; app.rapidpro.io used as the default server.
